creator: wilko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Powering down FC disk cab results in LIP, noted by the isp driver.
	This is OK. Running for example camcontrol rescan on the FC
	loop/bus results in camcontrol hanging in 'cbwait' forever.
	The I/O request obviously never times out.

Fix: 

Some timeout mechanism needs to be implemented so that a dead FCAL
	can be detected and attached FC/SCSI devices can be declared 'gone'
	properly.
How-To-Repeat: 
	See description
